theme_archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy - Water Variant) - Light Theme

design_philosophy.core_concept: Premium, trustworthy local business. Combines the purity of water (crisp whites, ocean blues, transparent glass effects) with accessibility (bilingual typography, warm accents).

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold
scale.label: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em]

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use py-24 for main sections, gap-8 to gap-12 for grids.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: For Services and 'Why Pure Water', use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gap-8. Mix tall and square spans.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm
surface_strategies.cards: Subtle border (border-slate-200) with rounded-2xl bg-white. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg border-cyan/30 transition-all duration-300
surface_strategies.modals: Solid white bg, rounded-3xl, shadow-2xl, backdrop-blur overlay (bg-black/30)
surface_strategies.footer: Contrast Shift: Dark Background (bg-[#0B3B60]), pure white text, py-20

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B3B60] text-white hover:bg-[#00A3E0] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.offer: bg-[#FF7A00] text-white hover:bg-[#E66E00] rounded-full px-6 py-2 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl
buttons.whatsapp_floating: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(37,211,102,0.4)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50
buttons.call_floating: fixed bottom-24 right-6 bg-[#0B3B60] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50

components.offer_badges: Absolute positioned ribbon, bg-[#FF7A00] text-white text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-bl-lg rounded-tr-lg top-0 right-0
components.icons: lucide-react for all standard UI icons (Droplet, Phone, MessageCircle, Wrench, Settings, CheckCircle). Use strokeWidth={1.5}.

motion_and_animations.scroll: Use framer-motion for fade-up + slight translateY on section entry.
motion_and_animations.hover: Water ripple effect or gentle lift (-translate-y-1) for product cards.
motion_and_animations.carousel: Smooth auto-play carousel for hero offers.

testing.data_testid: All interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-now-modal-button', data-testid='domestic-ro-tab').

hero_background.description: 3D pure water droplet ripple - Use for Hero section background or 'Why Pure Water' section

domestic_ro.description: High-end domestic RO machine in modern kitchen - Use for Domestic Products hero/card placeholder

commercial_ro.description: Commercial water plant - Use for Commercial Products category image

technician_service.description: Professional technician fixing purifier - Use for Services section hero

kitchen_context.description: Modern bright kitchen background for contextualizing domestic purifiers

water_splash.description: Pure water splashing - Use for 'Why Pure Water' visual

reference_posters.description: Reference images provided by the user. Use these as actual displays in the Special Offers Carousel and Product Showcases.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI completely with standard HTML semantic tags + Tailwind CSS styling + Shadcn/UI for complex interactivity (like dialogs/modals and carousels).
Ensure global typography uses Google Fonts 'Outfit' (for headings) and 'Mukta' (for body/Hindi content). Import these in index.css.
Implement a Sticky Header with glassmorphism backdrop (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) that persists on scroll, containing Logo, Nav links, EN/HI toggle, Call button, and Book Now CTA.

The Hero Section MUST contain an auto-play Carousel (using Embla or Shadcn Carousel) sliding through the Special Offers (₹99 RO Service, ₹299 Rental, ₹4999 Starting Price, Festive Offers). Incorporate the reference poster images provided in the media_assets.
Include a functional 'Book Now' Modal popup that grabs Name, Location, Contact, Email, and Service Type. Use Shadcn Dialog for accessibility.
Render fixed, floating WhatsApp and Call buttons on the bottom right (with z-50) at all times for easy mobile access.
Bilingual logic: Provide a simple EN/HI toggle button in the nav. When active, it should map to Hindi strings for core headings (e.g., 'स्वच्छ पानी, स्वस्थ परिवार').
Products page needs a tabbed view (Shadcn Tabs) for: Domestic Branded, Domestic Assembled, Commercial Branded, Commercial Assembled.
Make sure 'data-testid' is attached to every clickable button, navigation link, tab, and form input per the testing requirements.
